welcomeDescText: Your premium AI-driven legal sandbox. Analyze grievances under Indian law, simulate opposing courtroom debates, and audit agreements for risks instantly.
welcomeFeat1: Statutory citations with estimated confidence scores.
welcomeFeat3: Risk auditing and contract red-flag identification.
footerAboutBody: LexAI provides automated legal research and evaluation based on general principles of Indian jurisprudence. This system is for research purposes only. It does not constitute formal legal advice, and no attorney-client relationship is formed.
footerCaution: For serious statutory disputes, consult a certified advocate before filing filings.
